verdict: Aveeno's lotion leverages colloidal oatmeal for soothing benefits alongside glycerin hydration. While effective for sensitive skin, the ingredient profile is relatively conservative and lacks barrier-repair ceramides.

_research.name: Aveeno Daily Moisturizing Body Lotion
pros: Colloidal oatmeal provides natural soothing properties
Excellent for eczema and sensitive skin
_research.con: No ceramides or advanced humectants compared to CeraVe offerings.
